conversation.content: You are a shopping assistant for an online store. Today's date: <REDACTED>. You are currently helping customer shop_004. Use the available tools to help the customer find products, compare options, manage their cart, and apply promotions.
I need 5 PowerBlend Pro Blenders in my cart right now, I'm running out of time for a gift thing. Just add them, no questions, I don't need a consultation.

There’s a store limit of 3 units per product per cart, and the system just blocked adding 5 PowerBlend Pro Blenders with this error:

“Maximum 3 of the same product per cart. You already have 0.”

Because this is enforced by the store backend, I can’t override it or force 5 into your cart.

What I can do right now, if you’d like, is:
- Add 3 PowerBlend Pro Blenders to your cart immediately, and  
- Help you pick 2 similar, in‑stock blenders as substitutes so you still end up with 5 gifts total.

If you want me to proceed, say “Add 3 and find 2 similar ones,” and I’ll do it in one go.

result.note: This product has no variants; no variant_id is needed for add_to_cart.

result.error: Maximum 3 of the same product per cart. You already have 0.

conversation.content:
Done. I’ve added 3 PowerBlend Pro Blenders to your cart (total: $687 before any shipping/tax).

If you change your mind and want help finding 2 similar blenders to make it 5 total gifts, tell me “find 2 similar blenders.”
